title: 1000$ investment opportunity Big priceless return
author: LogicalFly5317
selftext:

This Is 100% real, legit. I know because of the scammers it might seem hard to trust when you see something like this but what you do when you actually in a situation like this. 

  
I am willing to provide all the verifications however, if you are gonna message me and disappear, not willing to come with a mindset to invest, and see this through till the end, can't make crypto transfer then please don't message. Don't waste my time. 

  
This is a mutual benefit offer and what I am offering you is so much more then you can find anywhere. People pay thousands of dollars for this. I will not only return your investment 1000$ with extra 1000$ on top in 24 hrs or you can set the amount. I will show you exact way I made  50k$ in 3 days and you can too again and again and the possibility is endless with this. I payed 10% of my earnings to learn this information which I will give you for free for helping me out. And your payment back in a day.
